title: Smoky, Savory Braised Ukrainian Pork Braise
description: A hearty, comforting dish with a rich, smoky flavor that's perfect for a cold winter's day. The combination of pork, barbecue sauce, and spices will cure even the most stubborn hangover.
instructions: Season the pork shoulder with salt, black pepper, and thyme.
Sear the pork in a hot pan until browned on all sides, then transfer it to the preheated salt block.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan and sauté until softened.
Add the barbecue sauce, red wine (if using), beef broth, and bay leaves to the pan.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Transfer the pork to the salt block and braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Remove the pork from the salt block and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Strain the juices and serve the pork with the braising liquid spooned over the top.
